approvalSource: Steve approved unattended overnight Foundation audit-control sprint and required audit findings to become fixes, live cards, gates, or proof instead of report noise.
constraints: do not redesign Recent Builds or Build Log UI
do not migrate all closeout records into a new DB table in this card
do not delete or rewrite closeout history
audit finding closes only when Build Log reads through a data-source boundary and source_contract_registry has the source row
each card must close with focused proof, System Health, repeated-failure gate, backlog hygiene, foundation:verify, process:foundation-ship, and clean pushed main
